title: Xanthous Bitter Northern Thai Wensleydale Curry
description: A bitter and tender curry featuring Wensleydale cheese, shio-koji cure, and ayurvedic-rajasic friendly ingredients, inspired by the flavors of Northern Thailand
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together shio-koji, coconut milk, and Thai red curry paste to create the curry base.
In a large pan, heat the curry base over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is fragrant and slightly thickened.
Add the kaffir lime leaves, lemon juice, fish sauce, brown sugar, and turmeric to the pan, stirring to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the curry for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the flavors have melded together and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the crumbled Wensleydale cheese until melted and smooth.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped basil and serve over rice or noodles.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired.
